name: SwipeGesture
shortDescription: Detect swipe gestures with angle, distance, and duration. Single-touch only.

eventsFunctions.name: DrawSwipe
eventsFunctions.description: Draw a line that indicates the current swipe gesture.  Edit "Outline Size" of the shape painter to adjust the thickness of the line.

eventsFunctions.name: SetLayer
eventsFunctions.fullName: Layer used to detect swipe gestures
eventsFunctions.description: Change the Layer used to detect swipe gestures.

eventsFunctions.name: Layer
eventsFunctions.fullName: Layer used to detect swipe gestures
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the Layer used to detect swipe gestures.

eventsFunctions.name: DistanceX
eventsFunctions.description: Compare Swipe distance in horizontal direction (pixels).

eventsFunctions.name: DistanceY
eventsFunctions.description: Compare Swipe distance in vertical direction (pixels).

eventsFunctions.name: StartX
eventsFunctions.fullName: Start point of the swipe X position
eventsFunctions.description: Compare Start point of the swipe X position.

eventsFunctions.name: StartY
eventsFunctions.fullName: Start point of the swipe Y position
eventsFunctions.description: Compare Start point of the swipe Y position.

eventsFunctions.name: EndX
eventsFunctions.fullName: End point of the swipe X position
eventsFunctions.description: Compare End point of the swipe X position.

eventsFunctions.name: EndY
eventsFunctions.fullName: End point of the swipe Y position
eventsFunctions.description: Compare End point of the swipe Y position.

eventsFunctions.name: IsSwipeInProgress
eventsFunctions.description: Check if a swipe is currently in progress.

eventsFunctions.name: IsSwipeDetectionEnabled
eventsFunctions.description: Check if swipe detection is enabled.

eventsFunctions.name: HasSwipeJustEnded
eventsFunctions.description: Check if the swipe has just ended.

eventsFunctions.name: SwipeDirection_4way
eventsFunctions.fullName: Swipe moved in a direction (4-way movement)
eventsFunctions.description: Check if swipe moved in a given direction.

eventsFunctions.name: SwipeDirection_8way
eventsFunctions.fullName: Swipe moved in a direction (8-way movement)
eventsFunctions.description: Check if swipe moved in a given direction.

description:
Use the "Enable swipe detection" action at the beginning of your scene.

Note: This extension does NOT support multitouch.

Expressions:

- `StartX`, `StartY`: Position where the swipe started
- `EndX`, `EndY`: Position where the swipe ended
- `Distance`: Length of the swipe, in pixels
- `DistanceX`, `DistanceY`: Distance the swipe moved in each axis
- `Angle`: Direction the swipe moved towards. Range (-180, 180)
- `Layer`: Layer used to detect swipe gestures

Conditions:

- `Is swipe detection enabled`
- `Is swipe in progress?` - A swipe starts when the mouse click or touch begins
- `Has swipe just ended?` - When the mouse or touch is released, this condition is true for one frame 
- `Swipe moved in a direction (4-way movement)` - the direction value for 4 sides (UP, DOWN, LEFT, RIGHT). In this case, the “circle” is divided into 4 segments of 90 degrees
- `Swipe moved in a direction (8-way movement)` - the direction value for 8 sides (UP, DOWN, LEFT, RIGHT, UP-LEFT, UP-RIGHT, DOWN-LEFT, DOWN-RIGHT). In this case, the “circle” is divided into 8 segments of 45 degrees.
